The '''Vibrodagger Killer''' was a dangerous criminal who committed several murders, presumably with a [[Vibrodagger/Legends|vibrodagger]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] turned a blind eye to his gruesome crimes, because all his victims had been [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] sympathizers. Members of the Rebel Alliance therefore took matters into their own hands. When they believed to have finally found out the identity of the Vibrodagger Killer, they sent out a [[holograph]] and dossier of the suspected individual to their [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] slicers to get the information out to their field agents.

==Behind the scenes==
The Vibrodagger Killer is mentioned in the mission description of a delivery mission called "By Any Means Necessary", that players of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' can get at Rebel Mission Terminals.
